title: Section 17
content: Any notice required to be given by the Bank under this Act may be served by post, but every such notice shall also be published by the Bank in 1[the Gazette of India or the Official Gazette of the State, according as the notice relates to a security, issued by the Central Government or a State Government], and on such publication shall be deemed to have been delivered to all persons for whom it is intended.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 6 of 1949, s. 7, for "the Official Gazette" (w.e.f. 1-4-1949).
